title: Create Simulated: End Sea Everywhere
description: Bare bones datapack that adds the End Sea from create simulated to other dimensions. Useful for Skyblock style modpacks.
body:
This is a simple datapack that adds the void sea from create simulated to the overworld and nether; useful for skyblock modpacks that don't want player contraptions falling into the void.

Requires create simulated, which as of writing is bundled with Create Aeronautics

Currently doesn't support modded dimensions, but that is subject to change.
